eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Pima, AZ; at 10:42 PM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 6:42 AM JUN 12, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Tucson, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Tucson Police Department is looking for Theodore A. Keith, 68 year white male, five feet seven inches tall, 125 pounds with white hair and brown eyes. Mr. Keith was last seen on foot on Thursday June 11, 2026 at 4:30 AM wearing gray shirt, blue jeans and white tennis shoes. Mr. Keith was last seen in the area of 7700 block of East Nicaragua, Tucson AZ. Mr. Keith suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to be lost or easily confused.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
